scripts.package:bin:linux-x64: npm run build:bundle && pkg build/esm/main.js --targets node22-linux-x64 --output release/poke-engine-linux-x64
scripts.package:bin:macos-x64: npm run build:bundle && pkg build/esm/main.js --targets node22-macos-x64 --output release/poke-engine-macos-x64
scripts.package:bin:macos-arm64: npm run build:bundle && pkg build/esm/main.js --targets node22-macos-arm64 --output release/poke-engine-macos-arm64
scripts.package:bin:win-x64: npm run build:bundle && pkg build/esm/main.js --targets node22-win-x64 --output release/poke-engine-win-x64.exe
scripts.package:bin:all: npm run package:bin:linux-x64 && npm run package:bin:macos-x64 && npm run package:bin:macos-arm64 && npm run package:bin:win-x64
scripts.validate:all: npm run validate:typecheck && npm run validate:test && npm run validate:accuracy && npm run validate:bench
